query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `listings` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`platform` enum('cian','avito','yandex') NOT NULL,
	`platformId` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
	`title` text,
	`address` text,
	`district` varchar(256),
	`metroStation` varchar(256),
	`metroDistanceMin` int,
	`metroDistanceType` varchar(32),
	`price` bigint,
	`area` int,
	`floor` int,
	`totalFloors` int,
	`description` text,
	`photos` json DEFAULT ('[]'),
	`url` text NOT NULL,
	`phone` varchar(64),
	`isNew` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
	`isSent` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
	`firstSeen` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`lastSeen` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `listings_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
